'''Task Force Token''' was one of five [[Task force/Legends|task forces]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet's]] [[New Republic Second Fleet]]. During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], Token was placed under the temporary command of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]], paired with [[Task Force Bellbright]] and led by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Tolokus]]. It served in [[General/Legends|General]] [[Etahn A'baht]]'s plan that culminated in [[Operation Strong Hand]] and was one of the last task forces to join the [[Battle of N'zoth]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
